notes.note:
The sports widget on the homepage now shows match cards in chronological order and opens to the live match, or the next upcoming one if there isn't a live match. ([Bug 2047473][1])


  [1]: https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2047473

text:
Thanks for using Firefox! Have feedback or suggestions? Join the conversation on [Mozilla Connect][1]. Need help? Our volunteer support community has you covered on [Mozilla Support][2] 

[1]: https://connect.mozilla.org/
[2]: https://mzl.la/AndroidSupport
title: Firefox for Android 152.0.1 Release
